mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (article_id, author_name, content, status) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{authorName}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, author_name, content, status, created_at FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, article_id, author_name, content, status, created_at FROM comments ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, article_id, author_name, content, status, created_at FROM comments WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
